title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Six Senses India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Hotel Manager at Six Senses India
jsonLd.description:
We at Six Senses India are looking for an experienced Hotel Manager based out of Kanpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Six Senses India:
Six Senses India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Six Senses India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
